name: lesto-benchmarks
description: Cross-framework benchmarks for Lesto: in-process render/router/dispatch comparisons (run anywhere) + a real-server HTTP load harness driven against pinned competitor apps (run in CI / locally). NOT an @lesto/* package, so it stays out of the publish + 100%-coverage gates. @lesto/* + react/preact resolve from the repo root; the competitor libs below install into an isolated benchmarks/node_modules (no impact on the root bun.lock).
